## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Testing

- [ ] Built locally in Xcode
- [ ] Ran relevant tests
- [ ] Checked iOS 26 simulator or device behavior

## Privacy and Safety

- [ ] This change does not log chat, prompt, persona, or saved-session content
- [ ] This change does not add a new network service
- [ ] Documentation is updated if data handling changed

## Notes for Reviewers

Call out risk areas, follow-up work, or screenshots here.
